# truenas_iscsi_portal (Resource)

Manages a TrueNAS iSCSI portal.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_iscsi_portal" "example" {
  listen  = [{ ip = "0.0.0.0" }]
  comment = "Default portal"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `listen` (Attributes List) List of IP addresses the portal listens on. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--listen))

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Description of the portal.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the iSCSI portal.
- `tag` (Number) The portal group tag, auto-assigned by TrueNAS.

<a id="nestedatt--listen"></a>
### Nested Schema for `listen`

Required:

- `ip` (String) IP address to listen on (e.g. 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import truenas_iscsi_portal.example 1
```
